target.title: fix(tui): deduplicate assistant messages across sessions.changed reload
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

TUI shows assistant replies duplicated when triggered via Telegram channel. The root cause is `handleSessionsChangedEvent` calling `clearTrackedRunState()` which clears `finalizedRuns`/`finalizedRunsWithDisplay` — allowing the just-finalized assistant message to be replayed and appended again during `loadHistory()` after a `sessions.changed` (reason: "new") event triggered by Telegram channel completion.

`loadHistory()` replays assistant messages without runIds, so replayed history cannot participate in runId-based dedup.

Fixes #96967

## Why This Change Was Made

The fix adds `chatFinalizedRuns`/`chatFinalizedRunsWithDisplay` maps that persist across `clearTrackedRunState()` for chat event deduplication, while agent event handling continues using only `finalizedRuns`.

Key mechanics:
- `noteFinalizedRun()` populates both `finalizedRuns` and `chatFinalizedRuns`
- `clearTrackedRunState()` clears `finalizedRuns` but **not** `chatFinalizedRuns`
- `handleChatEvent()` checks both maps before replaying late chat events
- Both maps are pruned via `pruneRunMap()` in `noteFinalizedRun()` to prevent unbounded growth

Changed: 1 file (`src/tui/tui-event-handlers.ts`), +15/-3

## Evidence

### Binary verification

```
OpenClaw 2026.6.9 (3aafc0f)
```

Binary commit hash matches HEAD.

### Test results

| Test suite | Tests | Result |
|---|---|---|
| `src/tui/tui-event-handlers.test.ts` | 79 | ✓ passed |
| `src/tui/tui-session-actions.test.ts` | 34 | ✓ passed |
| PTY TUI lane (`vitest.tui-pty.config.ts`) | 13 | ✓ passed |
| **Total** | **126** | **all passed** |

### Environment

- OS: Linux EL8, Node 24.13.1
- Branch: `fix/issue-96967-tui-duplicate-assistant`
- Commit: `3aafc0ffaeb080ed72d470370c5067d4610680ff`

### Not tested

Real E2E TUI-with-Telegram round-trip flow. Requires Telegram bot backend setup with channel interaction triggering `sessions.changed`. The PTY TUI lane exercises the event handler pipeline with fake backend; unit tests cover the dedup logic directly.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
